title: Altar SMP Arc 1
description: A replica of the plugin used in the popular Minecraft server called Altar SMP.
body:
This plugin is a replica of the Altar SMP Arc 1 plugin (which adds Boneblade, Bloodlust, Wand of Illusion, Frost Scythe and Vulcan's Crossbow + all the items needed to craft them and their corosponding altars.) This plugin lets you recreate what you see on the proper SMP.


# Setting it up:

It is very simple to set up since it has zero dependencies so all you need to do is put the .jar file in the plugins folder of your paper/spigot server. Please make sure everyone is using the texture pack as well (it only works if the clinet is on 1.21.4 or higher). Get the texture pack in my discord in the plugins channel. 

## Usage:

If you have op you can do:

/boneblade 
Gives you boneblade.
/bonealtar 
Spawns the bone blade altar.
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0a0f99241f97e53d108fddedf9b9d4d87034a4a4.png)

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5f10b65a119892fe7ec596ad81b9b2d9ac0f89c0.png)

/bloodlust
Gives you bloodlust.
/bloodaltar
Spawns the bloodlust altar.
You can change the bloodlust kills, the bleed chance, the bleed time and bleed damage in the config. 

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5a030003835b8162d6b4469734ac77e13c58e60c_0.webp)

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/72b9b666804343c94bf82da032a64e698e1fab1b.png)


/frostscythe
Gives you the frost scythe.
/frostaltar
Spawns the frost scythe altar.
You can change the damage of the frost scythe projectiles in the config but it does depend on the difficlty of the server a lot. 

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0c70b7153de0159808160e6ef93a6c5785242fc1.png)
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/eb1bbf1a526feeed18ee9fb663e56f0844c98bb5.png)


/vulcan'scrossbow 
Gives you vulcan's crossbow
/vulcanaltar
Spawns the vulcan crossbow altar.
You can change the power of the fire ball in the config but it does depend on the difficulty of the server a lot.
You can also change the damage of the normal vulcan's crossbow's arrows.

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8e199f20ccd93c67bb6d3e099feac695a591fb7a.png)

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4239de0512602ad50efec8a5199674b03aa5f9f0.png)

/wandofillusion
Gives you a wand of illusion.
/illusionaltar 
Spawns the wand of illusion altar.
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a768779a45d23c3e638f54cbd2a6b0f82a20f7d2.png)
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cac87a7f08051a360cc29032acde28d719602fe7.png)
All the mobs are configurable in the config for when you transform into them. By deafult flight is disabled for all of them since I felt this was a bit op but you can change it if you want. 
Example of what one of the mob's config looks like:
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a0c7506984325845f64b6aec881040c15d7628c9.png)
The transforming in to players and mobs looks a bit weird becuase I made my plugin spigot not paper so ye.
So far for per mob custom abilities I have added:
  Warden - sonnic boom attack, damage and cooldown cofigurable in config
  Enderman - throw a pearl, cooldown in config
  Elder Guardian - Gives nearby mining fatigue, cooldown in config
  Ender Dragon - Fire a dragon fireball, cooldown in config

/weaponhandle
Gives you a weapon handle.
/vulkanhead
Gives you a vulkan skull.
/wardenhead
Gives you a warden head
/illusioncore
Gives you an illusion core.

/removenearbyaltars gets rid of nearby altars.

If you don't have op:

You can craft the weapons at their corrosponding altar spawned in by someone who has op.
You can craft the wepaon handle with this recipe:
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5e664ca2e7beaea82abf08457996678541830b59.png)
You can craft the vulkan skull with this recipe:
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/34c810353c27c266bb4fc0e81f8ea9d01983fcf7.png)
You can craft the illusion core with this recipe:
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f78950fcdf758411ca83212f681a38537c9451fc.png)

Kill a warden and it will drop a warden heart.

### The abilites
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5cd45e3ad76e702878f38f8450c981014f61c054.png)
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/599538104b8c8d76b8437c84026f27e209c5c2ba.png)
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9b180c9d7300d5706fb4c062eb4dbefa0c31ed9d.png)
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2b5f60e8325da0beec91bf1972375b811df69493.png)
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/50f1288906aa7f49879ce8b3cb6051fe27d3c7e3.png)


Join the my discord which is linked for bug reports, suggestions and support.

The orignal textures were made by Tortanticle the Rob.
The current textures are made by Gwamba.
